question: Is the text "CHARLIE'S CHOCOLATE HEAVY INDUSTRIES: Dedicated to Manufacturing the World's Sweetest Dreams" spelled exactly correctly, including punctuation?
Is the title text "CHARLIE'S CHOCOLATE HEAVY INDUSTRIES..." rendered as an embossed effect on a giant chocolate brick?
Is the text "SUPER DONUT NUTRITION FACTS: Sugar per 100g: 99.9g, Energy Level: OFF THE CHARTS" spelled exactly correctly, including numbers and colons?
Is the nutrition facts text formed by buttercream piping on the side of a cake?
Is the text "SMART SORTING SYSTEM DATA: Red Beans 20%, Blue 30%, Green 50%" spelled exactly correctly, including percentages?
Is the sorting data text composed of colorful jelly beans arranged on a tray?
Is the text "LAB QUALITY CONTROL REPORT: Batch No. 50 Caramel Viscosity Test PASSED, Approved for Shipment" spelled exactly correctly?
Is the quality report text formed by caramel threads stretched across a plate?
Is the chemical formula text rendered as transparent sugar crystals glowing under lights?
Is the text "FACTORY SAFETY NOTICE: HIGH PRESSURE STEAM BURN HAZARD, ALWAYS WEAR PROTECTIVE GOGGLES DURING OPERATION" spelled exactly correctly?
Is the safety slogan text formed by condensed steam situated above a boiler?
Is the text "FOOD TRACEABILITY CODE: Production Batch 2026-FEB-07, Best Before: FOREVER" spelled exactly correctly, including the date format?
Is the traceability code text rendered as if pressed/molded into a round cookie?
Is the text "DENTAL CLINIC ITEMIZED BILL: Full Mouth Cavity Restoration Total $5,000.00, Payment Due Immediately" spelled exactly correctly, including currency symbols?

Are all text elements legible and free from garbled characters, missing strokes, or unrecognizable symbols?

Is the image free from extra branded text, logos, or unrequested labels?
Are the text areas clear of unnatural visual artifacts like smudging, ghosting, or floating debris?
